svg.title: How tool use and web search fix the LLM knowledge cutoff
svg.desc: A flowchart showing two paths from a user query. Left path: plain LLM hits its training cutoff and returns stale or wrong info. Right path: LLM with tool use detects the question needs fresh data, calls a web search tool, gets live results, and synthesises an up-to-date answer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why does an LLM have a knowledge cutoff date?')
sendPrompt('What does a stale LLM answer look like?')
sendPrompt('What happens when an LLM answers about recent events?')
sendPrompt('How does an LLM decide when to use a tool?')
sendPrompt('How does function calling work in LLMs?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the LLM calls a web search tool?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM read search results and form an answer?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM synthesise a cited answer from search results?')
